content_body: This was a wonderful anniversary. My husband planned a weekend away just for the two of us. Life was crazy enough with twins, but now with a newborn it is overwhelming. It was absolutely wonderful to wake up to the wonderful view and QUIET. The cabin is beautiful and had everything we needed. Thank you for allowing us a sample of your serenity. We hope to come back for time together with our family.
title: Anniversary In The North Georgia Mountains
